# Beit Al Layl — Modern Lebanese Restaurant

> Modern Lebanese cuisine in the heart of Downtown Dubai.

Beit Al Layl is a contemporary Lebanese restaurant located in Downtown Dubai, UAE. We serve modern interpretations of classic Levantine dishes — mezze, charcoal-grilled meats, fresh seafood, and traditional desserts — in a bright, Mediterranean-inspired setting.

## Menu Highlights
- Mezze: Hummus Beiruti, Fattoush Garden, Muhammara
- Mains: Lamb Kofta Tagine, Sea Bass Sayadieh, Chicken Shawarma Royale
- Charcoal Grill: Mixed Grill Platter, Wagyu Arayes, Whole Grilled Prawns
- Desserts: Knafeh, Rose Water Panna Cotta, Baklava Selection

## Location
Downtown Dubai, UAE

## Reservations
Book via our website or WhatsApp.

## Links
- Website: https://beit-al-layl.vercel.app
